text.title: Software Development Best Practices 2026 Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the best-practices-2026 methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: detect-stack
step.action: Identify TS+React+Next versions and Python+ruff+mypy presence.

step.name: score-each-item
step.action: For each rubric item, mark PASS/WARN/FAIL with evidence path.

step.name: prioritise-remediations
step.action: Order by weight × blast radius. ts-strict and py-313-strict come first.

step.name: apply-fixes-incrementally
step.action: One rubric item per PR; never bundle ts-strict flip with framework upgrade.
